profileStructure.hierarchyDescription: Max Account → Profiles (Adult/Kids) → Settings hierarchy. Two PIN systems: Parent Code (account-wide for Kid-Proof Exit) and Profile PIN (per-Adult-profile for access locking)

settings.setting: Avatar Image (120+ options or custom upload)
Maturity Ratings Group (Kids profiles: Little Kids/Big Kids/Pre-teens/Teens)
Kid-Proof Exit (requires Parent Code to leave Kids profile)

technicalRecon.subtitle: Comet REST API with token authentication, community reverse-engineering projects, and CAPTCHA login gate

apiArchitecture.title: Comet REST API
apiArchitecture.description: Max uses a REST API at comet.api.hbo.com for all backend communication. Authentication is token-based via POST to /tokens with credentials. The API handles content delivery, profile management, and settings. Analytics telemetry goes to telegraph.api.hbo.com. Unlike Netflix's proprietary Falcor protocol, Max uses standard REST patterns, making the API more discoverable but still undocumented and unsupported. CAPTCHA challenges may gate login requests.

codeExample.exampleComment: // Login request (credentials in body, token returned)

authDetails.label: Primary Auth
authDetails.description: POST credentials to comet.api.hbo.com/tokens. Returns session token for subsequent API requests.

authDetails.label: CAPTCHA Gate
authDetails.description: CAPTCHA may trigger during login. ~5 attempts before lockout. Widely criticized for difficulty. May be removed per Max support.

authDetails.label: Password Gate
authDetails.description: Profile PIN and Parent Code changes require account password re-entry. No email/SMS MFA -- simpler than Netflix.

authDetails.label: Parent Code
authDetails.description: Required for Kid-Proof Exit (leaving Kids profile). Separate from Profile PIN. One code per account.

authDetails.label: Profile PIN
authDetails.description: Locks individual Adult profiles. PIN change triggers email notification to account holder.

rateLimitNotes: No explicit rate limiting documented in community research
CAPTCHA challenges observed during login flows (dice puzzles, animal sounds, ~5 attempts before lockout)
Password sharing enforcement active since September 2025 (IP address, device ID, activity pattern monitoring)
Email notifications sent on Profile PIN changes -- creates visible audit trail for account owner
Session token TTL not documented in community research -- needs live testing
Community API projects (DmanCoder/hbo-max-api) may be outdated due to HBO Max -> Max -> HBO Max rebrands
technicalRecon.harCaptureCount: Community projects identified primary endpoints at comet.api.hbo.com; live HAR capture needed for current endpoint catalog

tosWarning.title: HBO Max Terms of Use -- Automated Access Prohibition
tosWarning.description: HBO Max ToS prohibits 'data mining, robots, viruses, worms, bugs, or other data gathering and extraction tools' and attempts to 'circumvent, disable, or otherwise tamper with any security technology.' Active password sharing enforcement (IP/device monitoring) since September 2025 adds significant risk for server-based automation from data center IPs.

overallRisk.description: Higher than Netflix due to active password sharing enforcement that may flag Phosra's server-based access. CAPTCHA adds login complexity. Offsetting positive: no MFA on settings changes.

detectionVectors.mitigation: Attempt REST API login first; fall back to Playwright with stealth mode. Cache tokens aggressively to minimize logins
Use residential proxies or on-device agent architecture. Data center IPs will likely trigger household enforcement
Use Playwright stealth plugin (playwright-extra) to mask automation signals
Inform parents they will receive emails when Phosra manages PINs. Informational only, not a detection risk
Monitor WBD announcements. Maintain flexible selectors. Budget for quarterly adapter maintenance
Rate limit to 1 action per 5-10 seconds; cache aggressively

mitigationsChecklist: Enable Playwright stealth mode for all browser automation sessions
Cache session tokens aggressively (minimize login frequency, avoid CAPTCHA triggers)
Implement CAPTCHA detection and graceful fallback to Playwright login
Use residential proxy or on-device agent architecture to avoid password sharing enforcement triggers
Implement exponential backoff on retry logic
Use REST API for reads; reserve browser automation for writes only
Add human-like random delays (2-8s) between navigation steps
Inform parents about email notifications triggered by Profile PIN changes
Monitor for domain/URL changes due to rebrand cycles (HBO Max -> Max -> HBO Max)
Batch parental control changes into single password-verified sessions

stats.label: Phosra-Added
stats.color: bg-green-100 text-green-700 dark:bg-green-900/30 dark:text-green-300 ring-1 ring-green-300 dark:ring-green-700

gapOpportunities.title: Per-Title Blocking
gapOpportunities.gap: Max has NO per-title blocking. Content filtering is maturity-tier-based only. Parents cannot block a specific show (e.g., a particular PG show) while allowing others at the same tier.
gapOpportunities.solution: Cannot be solved via Phosra -- the platform does not offer this feature. Phosra can only recommend adjusting the maturity tier downward or using device-level controls for specific content. This is a significant gap vs. Netflix.

gapOpportunities.title: Screen Time Limits
gapOpportunities.gap: Max has no meaningful native screen time limits. No daily caps, no scheduling, no usage reports.
gapOpportunities.solution: Phosra monitors Continue Watching via REST API polling. When estimated watch time exceeds the limit, the child's profile is locked by toggling Kid-Proof Exit and changing the Parent Code. Accuracy is limited due to lack of viewing duration data.

gapOpportunities.title: Viewing History & Reports
gapOpportunities.gap: Max has NO viewing history feature. Continue Watching is the only indicator -- no timestamps, no duration, no historical log. Items auto-expire after 90 days and can be manually cleared by the child.
gapOpportunities.solution: Phosra polls Continue Watching frequently and maintains its own viewing log by tracking changes over time. Reports will be incomplete -- completed titles are missed, no duration data. Parents should be informed of these limitations.

gapOpportunities.title: Activity Alerts
gapOpportunities.gap: Max sends no parent alerts. Parents have zero visibility into what their child watches in real-time.
gapOpportunities.solution: Phosra monitors Continue Watching for new or unexpected titles and sends parent notifications. Very limited fidelity compared to Netflix integration due to Max's sparse viewing data.

gapOpportunities.title: Bedtime Mode
gapOpportunities.gap: Max has no scheduling. Children can watch content at any hour with no time-of-day restrictions.
gapOpportunities.solution: Phosra toggles Kid-Proof Exit and changes the Parent Code on a parent-defined schedule via cron-triggered Playwright automation. Note: this affects ALL Kids profiles on the account since Parent Code is account-wide.

credentials.name: Parent Code (original + Phosra-generated)
credentials.purpose: Kid-Proof Exit management + screen time enforcement

integrationGap.apiDescription: REST API (reads) + Playwright (writes). Dual PIN system (Parent Code + Profile PIN). No per-title blocking.

steps.title: Monitor
steps.detail: Poll Continue Watching every 15-30 min via REST API. Track new titles appearing, progress changes, and titles disappearing. No duration data available.

steps.title: Detect
steps.detail: Approximate viewing time from Continue Watching changes. No duration data available -- estimation only. Compare vs parent-set limit.

steps.title: Lock
steps.detail: Toggle Kid-Proof Exit ON and change Parent Code to Phosra-generated value via Playwright automation. Note: affects ALL Kids profiles (Parent Code is account-wide).

steps.title: Notify
steps.detail: Push notification to parent via Phosra app with estimated viewing summary and lock confirmation. Note: viewing data is approximate due to platform limitations.

limitations.title: No viewing history
limitations.description: Max has no viewing history feature. Continue Watching is the only proxy -- completed titles vanish, no timestamps, no duration. Parental reports are inherently incomplete.

limitations.title: ~30 min polling delay + no duration data
limitations.description: Continue Watching is polled, not real-time. Phosra cannot measure actual watch time -- only detect changes. Significant overshoot likely before profile is locked.

limitations.title: Account-wide Parent Code
limitations.description: Parent Code applies to ALL Kids profiles. Locking one child's profile affects all children on the account. Per-child enforcement is not possible via this mechanism.

limitations.title: Password sharing enforcement risk
limitations.description: Max actively monitors for multi-household access (IP, device ID, activity patterns) since September 2025. Phosra's server-based automation may trigger sharing enforcement, potentially requiring residential proxy infrastructure.

enforcementFlow.loopLabel: Repeats daily until parent adjusts limits. Parent Code restored when limit resets.

methods.name: authenticate
methods.recommendation: Attempt REST API /tokens first. Fall back to Playwright with stealth mode if CAPTCHA triggered. Cache tokens aggressively.

methods.name: listProfiles
methods.recommendation: Use REST API with cached session token. Parse profile types (Adult/Kids), maturity tiers, PIN status.

methods.name: getProfileSettings
methods.recommendation: Use REST API. Retrieve maturity tier, Kids Mode status, Kid-Proof Exit, autoplay toggles.

methods.name: setContentRestrictions
methods.recommendation: Playwright with password re-entry. No MFA -- simpler than Netflix. 4 maturity tiers available.

methods.name: setTitleRestrictions
methods.recommendation: Return UnsupportedOperationError. Max does not offer per-title blocking.

methods.name: setProfilePIN
methods.recommendation: Playwright for both Profile PIN and Parent Code. Note: email notification sent on PIN changes.

methods.name: getWatchHistory
methods.recommendation: Poll Continue Watching only. No historical viewing log exists. Set expectations with parents about data gaps.

methods.name: lockProfile
methods.recommendation: Toggle Kid-Proof Exit + change Parent Code. Note: affects ALL Kids profiles (account-wide). Store original values for restoration.

methods.name: createKidsProfile
methods.recommendation: Playwright. No auth required (security gap). Verify profile count (max 5). Enable Kid-Proof Exit by default.

methods.name: supportsNativeScreenTime
methods.recommendation: Returns false. Max has no confirmed native screen time features.

timelinePhases.label: Foundation
timelinePhases.components: Session Manager (3-4d), Read Layer (2-3d), CAPTCHA handling (1-2d)

timelinePhases.label: Monitoring
timelinePhases.components: Screen Time Enforcer (2-3d), Continue Watching Poller (1-2d)
